message:
Running command: # grt.tcl ends with write_guide. So the grt step only does GRT + antenna check.
# The PSM check must happen in the Python wrapper, not in the TCL script.
# Let's check the Python step class for GlobalRouting
grep -n "PSM\|check_connectivity\|connectivity_failed\|VCCD\|failed" \
    /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/steps/openroad.py 2>/dev/null | head -20

args.command:
# grt.tcl ends with write_guide. So the grt step only does GRT + antenna check.
# The PSM check must happen in the Python wrapper, not in the TCL script.
# Let's check the Python step class for GlobalRouting
grep -n "PSM\|check_connectivity\|connectivity_failed\|VCCD\|failed" \
